title: Mildly Smoky Indian Bacon Skewers
description: A charred, light, brunch-mood Indian dish featuring bacon, perfect for a Buddhist temple friendly meal. This dish is made with spherified bacon and Indian spices.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Cut the bacon slices into small pieces and add to the bowl, mixing well.
Thread a piece of bacon onto each bamboo skewer.
Using a syringe, drop small amounts of the bacon mixture into a bath of water with algin, creating spherified bacon.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot with the spherified bacon.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
Repeat the process until all the ingredients are used up.
